payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial edge-cropped upper wall cabinet door in dark reddish-brown stained wood with a recessed raised-panel rectangular center and visible wood grain, matte finish and no hardware visible; appears to be about 1.2 meters from the camera.
